examples.text: 05. Example output dtype is bfloat16 when autocast is disabled. This mismatch later gets amplified by softmax/topk in generation, causing decoding divergence. we eval math500 dataset and get a +2% performance gain in Pro6000. What I already tried: torch.

source.text: LLaDA inference logits differ across NVIDIA GPUs (Blackwell vs 4090) with same weights/code · Issue #131 · ML-GSAI/LLaDA
